title: How Investors Can Support Child Safety At GoDaddy And Cloudflare
body: Child safety online is a material investment risk in most portfolios.  Here's how GoDaddy and Cloudflare investors can reduce risks and improve returns and sustainability

title: Cloudflare Will Filter Out Web Crawlers That Serve AI Companies
body: The hosting platform wants sites to have more control over how AI companies use their content.

title: Cloudflare, OpenAI team up to launch research pilot for AI search indexing
body: Cloudflare (NET) and OpenAI (OPENAI) are launching a research pilot to explore how insights from participating websites across Cloudflare's global network can help AI search engines improve indexing web content.

title: NET Stock Alert: What to Know as Cloudflare Teams Up With OpenAI
body: Cloudflare and OpenAI announced a research pilot for AI search indexing. Here's what the partnership really means for NET shares.

title: Cloudflare Is Up 9% Today: Is It Outperforming Other AI Cloud Stocks Like Oracle, CoreWeave, and Snowflake?
body: Shares of Cloudflare (NYSE:NET | NET Price Prediction) are up 9% in midday trading to about $269 after Scotiabank upgraded the stock and raised its price target. The move puts Cloudflare shares near a fresh 52-week high of $276.

title: Cloudflare stock jumps as Scotiabank upgrades on AI growth outlook
body: Monetization Gateway (Pay Per Use for AI agents) is the next step to convert that traffic into higher-margin revenue, and the market hasn't fully priced it yet. Key upside is re-rating toward the $300 target as 2H26 expectations reset.

title: Cloudflare spent a year blocking AI crawlers. Now it's helping OpenAI index the web
body: Cloudflare is piloting with OpenAI to feed real-time network signals into ChatGPT's search, a turn for a firm built on blocking AI crawlers.

title: Cloudflare announces research pilot with OpenAI
body: Research pilot combines Cloudflare's global network signals with OpenAI's frontier search capabilities
